creator: n_carlsson@outlook.com
text:
So, this port hasn't been properly updated in 4.5 years, it has been broken for 3.5 months, I made this PR soon to be 2 months ago and I thought myself some basics of the ports system/poudriere/making a diff in svn and uploaded a patch over 1 month ago.

Some kind of answer would have been nice after watching this thread almost every day since. Just to know that someone has recognized it more than changing it from new to open.
Is there something I should do differently or should I just keep waiting?
